briefdescription.para: The logger used with this GameWorld instance.

detaileddescription.para: Defaults to HELIOS_LOG_SCOPE.

briefdescription.para: The current level loaded in the game world.

detaileddescription.para: Can be null if no level is currently active.

briefdescription.para: Type-indexed registry for Managers and CommandBuffers.

detaileddescription.para: Provides O(1) type-based access via ManagerRegistry and CommandBufferRegistry. Owns all registered Manager and CommandBuffer instances via ConceptModelRegistry.

briefdescription.para: Registry mapping command types to their handler function pointers.

detaileddescription.para: Used by TypedCommandBuffer during flush to route commands to the correct handler. Handlers are registered via `registerCommandHandler<CommandTypes...>(owner)`.

briefdescription.para: Entity registry for handle allocation and validation.

detaileddescription.para: Manages entity lifecycle including creation, destruction, and stale handle detection via versioning.

briefdescription.para: Entity manager for component storage.

detaileddescription.para: Stores components in type-indexed SparseSets and provides methods for component manipulation. Marked `mutable` to allow const methods to use it without const_cast.

briefdescription.para: The current game session holding state data.
Constructs the GameWorld.

detaileddescription.para: Initializes the EntityManager with the internal EntityRegistry and creates a Session backed by a dedicated GameObject.

parameterdescription.para: Initial capacity for the underlying SparseSets. Must be large enough to accommodate the total number of entities (including pooled clones) to avoid reallocation during cloning. Defaults to ENTITY_MANAGER_DEFAULT_CAPACITY.

briefdescription.para: Non-copyable.
Non-copyable.
Non-movable.
Non-movable.
Returns a reference to the current game session.

simplesect.para: Reference to the Session.

briefdescription.para: Returns a reference to the underlying EntityManager.

simplesect.para: Reference to the EntityManager.

briefdescription.para: Initializes all registered managers.

detaileddescription.para: Should be called after all managers have been added and before the game loop starts. Each manager's init() method is invoked with a reference to this GameWorld.

briefdescription.para: Sets the current level for the game world.

parameterdescription.para: Unique pointer to the Level instance. Ownership is transferred to the GameWorld.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a level is currently loaded.

simplesect.para: True if a level is set, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the currently loaded level.

simplesect.para: Const pointer to the active Level.
Calling this method when hasLevel() returns false results in undefined behavior.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether a Manager of type T is registered.

parameterdescription.para: The Manager type. Must satisfy IsManagerLike.

simplesect.para: True if the Manager is registered.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether a CommandBuffer of type T is registered.

parameterdescription.para: The CommandBuffer type. Must satisfy IsCommandBufferLike.

simplesect.para: True if the CommandBuffer is registered.

briefdescription.para: Registers and constructs a Manager of type T.

detaileddescription.para: Delegates to ResourceRegistry::emplace. The Manager is constructed in-place with forwarded arguments and owned by the ManagerRegistry.

parameterdescription.para: The Manager type. Must satisfy IsManagerLike.
Constructor argument types.
Arguments forwarded to the T constructor.

simplesect.para: Reference to the newly registered Manager.

briefdescription.para: Registers and constructs a CommandBuffer of type T.

detaileddescription.para: Delegates to ResourceRegistry::emplace. The buffer is constructed in-place with forwarded arguments and owned by the CommandBufferRegistry.

parameterdescription.para: The CommandBuffer type. Must satisfy IsCommandBufferLike.
Constructor argument types.
Arguments forwarded to the T constructor.

simplesect.para: Reference to the newly registered CommandBuffer.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a registered Manager by type.

parameterdescription.para: The Manager type. Must satisfy IsManagerLike.

simplesect.para: Reference to the Manager.
A Manager of type T must be registered.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a registered Manager by type, or nullptr if not found.

parameterdescription.para: The Manager type. Must satisfy IsManagerLike.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the Manager, or nullptr if not registered.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a registered CommandBuffer by type, or nullptr if not found.

parameterdescription.para: The CommandBuffer type. Must satisfy IsCommandBufferLike.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the CommandBuffer, or nullptr if not registered.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a registered CommandBuffer by type.

parameterdescription.para: The CommandBuffer type. Must satisfy IsCommandBufferLike.

simplesect.para: A CommandBuffer of type `T` must already be registered. Use tryCommandBuffer<T>() when the buffer is optional.
Reference to the CommandBuffer.

briefdescription.para: Registers a command handler for one or more command types.

detaileddescription.para: Stores a type-erased function pointer for each CommandType that routes to `owner.submit(cmd)`. During flush, the TypedCommandBuffer uses the CommandHandlerRegistry to dispatch queued commands to the registered handler.

parameterdescription.para: The command types to register handlers for.
The handler type. Must satisfy IsCommandHandlerLike.
Reference to the handler instance. Must outlive the GameWorld.

briefdescription.para: Returns a reference to the CommandHandlerRegistry.

simplesect.para: Reference to the CommandHandlerRegistry.

briefdescription.para: Flushes all registered Managers.

detaileddescription.para: Iterates over all Managers in registration order and invokes `flush(updateContext)` on each. Called by the GameLoop at commit points after the CommandBuffer has been flushed.

parameterdescription.para: The current frame's update context.

briefdescription.para: Flushes all registered CommandBuffers.

detaileddescription.para: Iterates over all CommandBuffers in registration order and invokes `flush(*this, updateContext)` on each. Called by the GameLoop at commit points before Managers are flushed.

parameterdescription.para: The current frame's update context.

briefdescription.para: Creates a new GameObject in the world.

detaileddescription.para: Allocates an entity handle via the EntityRegistry and returns a lightweight GameObject wrapper. The returned GameObject is ~16 bytes and should be passed by value.

simplesect.para: A new GameObject ready for component attachment.
GameObject
EntityManager::create

briefdescription.para: Creates a View for iterating entities with specific components.

detaileddescription.para: Returns a lightweight view that iterates over all entities possessing the specified component types. Use with range-based for loops and structured bindings.
```cpp for (auto [entity, transform, velocity, active] : gameWorld.view< TransformComponent, VelocityComponent, Active >().whereEnabled()) { // Process matching entities } ```

parameterdescription.para: The component types to query for.

simplesect.para: A View for iterating matching entities.
View

briefdescription.para: Creates a const View for iterating entities with specific components.

parameterdescription.para: The component types to query for.

simplesect.para: A const View for iterating matching entities.

briefdescription.para: Finds a GameObject by its EntityHandle.

detaileddescription.para: Validates the handle and returns a GameObject wrapper if valid. Returns std::nullopt if the handle is stale or invalid.

parameterdescription.para: The EntityHandle to look up.

simplesect.para: Optional containing the GameObject if found, std::nullopt otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Attempts to remove an entity from the GameWorld.

detaileddescription.para: Delegates to the EntityManager who is then tasked to remove the entity and all associated components.

parameterdescription.para: The EntityHandle to remove.

simplesect.para: True if the entity was removed, otherwise false.
EntityManager::destroy()

briefdescription.para: Finds a GameObject by its EntityHandle (const version).

parameterdescription.para: The EntityHandle to look up.

simplesect.para: Optional containing the GameObject if found, std::nullopt otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Clones a GameObject and all its components.

detaileddescription.para: Creates a new entity and copies all components from the source to the target. The new GameObject is initially inactive. Components with `onClone()` hooks will have them invoked after copy construction.

parameterdescription.para: The source GameObject to clone.

simplesect.para: A new inactive GameObject with cloned components.
EntityManager::clone

briefdescription.para: Resets all managers and the session to their initial state.

detaileddescription.para: Called during level transitions or game restarts to clear accumulated state. Invokes reset() on all managers and the session.

briefdescription.para: Returns a reference to the ResourceRegistry.

detaileddescription.para: Use for direct resource access. Prefer the convenience methods `registerManager()`, `registerCommandBuffer()`, `manager()`, `tryManager()`, and `tryCommandBuffer()` for type-constrained access.

simplesect.para: Reference to the ResourceRegistry.

briefdescription.para: Returns a reference to the ResourceRegistry.

detaileddescription.para: Use for direct resource access. Prefer the convenience methods `registerManager()`, `registerCommandBuffer()`, `manager()`, `tryManager()`, and `tryCommandBuffer()` for type-constrained access.

simplesect.para: Reference to the ResourceRegistry.
